active_profile_source: accepted S12/S13/S16/human findings plus owner gate policy and current material graph slice; no global venue/profile default
producer_return_obligations: repair the paper globally and rerun downstream checks
downstream_design_force: S15 receives bounded repair packets with protected nodes and validation plan
upstream stages receive precise backflow tasks instead of global rewrite instructions
S16 and RenderedManuscriptAuditGate can verify that accepted findings have planned/closed repair routes before handoff

failure_severity_policy.BLOCKING: accepted finding lacks intake coverage, concrete stage route, repair scope, or owner gate status
failure_severity_policy.MAJOR: plan uses global rewrite, bare S09, hidden stale nodes, or executes repair inside S14
failure_severity_policy.MINOR: local priority, label, or response-action metadata defect without scope/routing drift
failure_severity_policy.WATCH: ambiguous owner/reviewer preference tracked without autonomous semantic repair

nearest_responsible_stage_policy: S14 owns backflow normalization/routing defects; substantive content defects are assigned to the nearest responsible production/control stage.
anti_over_strictness_boundary: MINOR/WATCH findings may stay as risk/clarification items; only accepted BLOCKING/MAJOR repair items require S15 or upstream repair tasks.
